name: Pineapple Orange Creme
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix graham cracker crumbs and butter. Reserve 1/3 cup of the crumb mixture.
2. Press the remaining crumb mixture into an ungreased baking pan, 8 x 8 x 2 inches.
3. In a mixer bowl, beat dry milk, orange juice, and egg white on high speed for 3 minutes.
4. Add lemon juice; beat for another 3 minutes at high speed.
5. Blend in sugar on low speed for about 1/2 minute.
6. Fold in the crushed pineapple.
7. Pour into the pan and sprinkle with the reserved crumb mixture.
8. Freeze for at least 8 hours.
9 servings (110 calories each)
